subcodes.first_line: O kind friend! The epistle, replete with wondrous meanings, brought joy to my soul, for it serveth as evidence of spiritual attractions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان نامه بدیع المعانی مورث سرور وجدانی گردید زیرا دلیل بر انجذابات
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
